persona.mission: To visualize the invisible risks of AI with surgical precision and artistic depth.

project_context.name: Agatha AI Governance Engine
project_context.audience: Risk Managers, Compliance Officers, AI Ethics Boards
project_context.emotional_goal: Absolute clarity in chaos. Trust through precision.

headings.usage: Use for H1-H4. Tracking tight (-0.02em). Weight 700 or 900.

body.usage: Use for all body text, data tables, and labels. Tracking normal.

bento_rules: Use col-span-2 or col-span-3 for primary data visualization.

tracing_beam.concept: A glowing gradient border that traces the edge of the container.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(130,80,255,0.3)] transition-all duration-300

cards.default: bg-card border border-border/40 shadow-none rounded-xl overflow-hidden

inputs.default: bg-secondary/50 border-border/40 focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary/50 rounded-lg

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALL FONTS: Add the Google Fonts links to /app/frontend/public/index.html first.
2. UPDATE TAILWIND: Modify /app/frontend/src/index.css with the provided HSL color values in the :root and .dark layers.
3. CONFIGURE FONTS: Update /app/frontend/tailwind.config.js to include 'Chivo' and 'Manrope'.
4. COMPONENT OVERRIDES: When using Shadcn components, always strip the default rounded-md if it conflicts with the 'rounded-xl' card style.
5. CHARTS: Use Recharts ResponsiveContainer for all charts to ensure they fit the grid.
6. USE SONNER: Ensure 'Toaster' from 'sonner' is added to the root layout.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts. Use grids.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) for floating elements.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (transition: all).
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable inside cards.
Subtle grain textures or noise overlays are encouraged for the background.
